name: Fried Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook asparagus spears in boiling salted water until barely tender. Drain on paper towels.
2. In a wide bowl, beat egg with milk.
3. Dip asparagus spears into the egg mixture, then into bread crumbs.
4. Heat oil to 364°F (180°C) in a deep fryer or large skillet. The pan should be wider than the length of the asparagus spears.
5. Fry coated asparagus, a few at a time, until lightly browned, about 2 minutes.
6. Drain on paper towels. Season with salt and pepper. Sprinkle with grated cheese.
